title: Super_Items
description: “Super Items introduces powerful new materials to craft advanced tools, weapons, and armor, giving your Minecraft adventures a major boost!”
body:
Super Items (v1.0.0) – Minecraft 1.21.8

Super Items adds powerful new materials to Minecraft, letting you craft advanced tools, weapons, and armor with unique abilities. Strengthen your gameplay, explore new crafting possibilities, and take your adventures to the next level!

Features:

Adds the all-new Super Items material.

Craft powerful tools, weapons, and armor.

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.8 (Neoforge).

Easy to install and use.

Installation:

Make sure Minecraft 1.21.8 and Neoforge are installed.

Place the Super_items-1.0.0-neoforge-1.21.8.jar in your mods folder.

Launch Minecraft and enjoy your new items!
